who have committed serious violent or sexual offenses.

and discriminatory to make access
to redress conditional on a person's criminal history rather

source_metadata.description:
Monday 15 December | Social Services and Community Sub-Committee A
Redress System for Abuse in Care Bill
Hearing of evidence:
Citizens Advice Bureau
Sacha Green, National Advisor - Legal & Strategic
Mana Mokopuna – Children’s Commissioner

Dr Claire Achmad, Children’s Commissioner

Network for Survivors of Faith-based Schools in Te Waipounamu Charitable Trust

Taria Brown

Max Marshall
